0110010011101110 1111011010101101 0 -> sum: 0101101110011011, cout: 1
0110101000111100 1101100001111100 0 -> sum: 0100001010111000, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
